message:
✨ Add progress ring to remaining compliance cards (#2585)

Add subtle ProgressRing component to show cluster scan progress
visually across all 6 remaining compliance dashboard cards:
- RecommendedPolicies, ComplianceDrift, FleetComplianceHeatmap
- KyvernoPolicies, CrossClusterPolicyComparison, OPAPolicies

Each card now shows a circular progress indicator that fills as
clusters are checked, replacing the generic spinner. Inline
progress rings appear in the content area while data streams in.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
